query:
SELECT 
  m.id as movie_id,
  m.title,
  m.releaseDate,
  s.id as scene_id,
  s.title as scene_title,
  COUNT(spa.id) as action_count,
  SUM(a.points) as total_points
FROM movies m
JOIN scenes s ON m.id = s.movieId
LEFT JOIN scenePerformerActions spa ON s.id = spa.sceneId
LEFT JOIN actions a ON spa.actionId = a.id
WHERE m.releaseDate >= '2025-03-01' AND m.releaseDate <= '2025-05-31'
GROUP BY m.id, m.title, m.releaseDate, s.id, s.title
ORDER BY m.releaseDate DESC;

  s.title as scene_title,
  COUNT(spa.id) as action_count,
  SUM(a.points) as total_points
FROM movies m
JOIN scenes s ON m.id = s.movieId
LEFT JOIN scenePerformerActions spa ON s.id = spa.sceneId
LEFT JOIN actions a ON spa.actionId = a.id
WHERE m.releaseDate >= '2025-03-01' AND m.releaseDate <= '2025-05-31'
